notes: v376 — The 📋 report card now shows a small badge telling you WHERE it was graded: ‘⚡ GRADED ON YOUR SERVER’ when it used your Cloudflare server, or ‘🖥 COMPUTED ON THIS DEVICE’ if it briefly fell back to grading in your browser. This lets us confirm your server is doing the grading before the final step (removing the formula from the page entirely). Nothing else changes. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5), open the report card, and check which badge it shows.
